english:
Rakashans

Rakashans are humanoid felines. Some have the bright colors of tigers, the speckled hides of leopards, or the exotic look of Siamese cats. All have sharp claws and teeth, and a cruel nature when it comes to dealing with their prey.

Rakashans can be found in their own remote and exotic cities or as fringe elements of normal society. They are often too clever and beautiful to be shunned, but too cunning to gain others’ complete trust.

  • AGILE: Feline grace gives rakashans a d6 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Agility} attribute instead of a d4. This increases maximum Agility to d12+1.
  • BITE/CLAWS: Rakashan fangs and claws are @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Natural Weapons]{Natural Weapons} that cause Strength+d4 damage.
  • BLOODTHIRSTY: Rakashans can be cruel to their foes, often toying with them for simple amusement. They rarely take prisoners and feel little compunction about punishing captured foes. They have the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Bloodthirsty]{Bloodthirsty} Hindrance.
  • CAN'T SWIM: Rakashans actually can swim, they just shun it and are not particularly good at it. They subtract 2 from @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics} (swimming) rolls and each tabletop inch of movement in water uses 3″ of @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{Pace}.
  • LOW LIGHT VISION: Rakashan eyes amplify light. They ignore penalties for Dim and Dark @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{Illumination}.
  • RACIAL ENEMY: Rakashan society rose at the expense of another. Pick a common race in your setting. Members of each culture subtract 2 from @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{Persuasion} when dealing with each other and often attack on sight.
chinese:
猫族

猫族是类人猫科动物。其中一些有着老虎般明亮的色彩，豹子的斑点皮毛或是暹罗猫的奇异外表。所有猫族都具备尖牙利爪，以及对付猎物时的冷酷天性。

猫族常见于他们自己那偏远而奇异的城市，或是作为正常社会边缘的元素出现。他们过人的魅力以及头脑通常让人难以生厌，但同时又狡诈得让人无法完全信任。

  • 灵巧：猫科动物的优雅让猫族的起始@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{灵巧}从d4变成d6，这让其灵巧上限提升到d12+1。
  • 噬咬/爪抓：猫族的尖牙和利爪是@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03naturalweapo00]{天生武器}，其造成的伤害为力量+d4。
  • 嗜血：猫族面对敌人时冷酷无比，而且会出于单纯的愉悦而玩弄对方。猫族鲜少会留下俘虏，并且在惩罚抓获的敌人时毫无内疚。他们具有@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Bloodthirsty]{嗜血}负赘。
  • 不谙水性：猫族其实能游泳，只是对此并不擅长，同时也会敬而远之。他们的@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}(游泳)投骰-2，而且位于桌面上时每在水中移动一英寸消耗3英寸@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{移速}。
  • 微光视觉：猫族的眼睛能放大光线，他们忽略昏暗和黑暗造成的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{照明}减值。
  • 族裔夙敌：猫族社会乃是以他族作为代价才得以崛起。选择世设中的某一普通族裔，双方成员在相处时@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{交涉}-2，而且通常见面就会开打。

english:
Beast Friend

See power @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Beast Friend]{here}.

Rank: Novice

Power Points: Special

Range: Smarts

Duration: 10 minutes

School: Enchantment

Trappings: The caster concentrates and gestures with his hands.

This spell allows an individual to speak with and guide the actions of nature’s beasts. The cost to cast is equal to the sum of their @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Size} (minimum 1 per creature; see the creatures in @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore08bestia.JournalEntryPage.08bestiary000000]{Bestiary} for an example). Controlling five wolves (Size −1) costs 5 points, for example. Controlling a rhino (Size 5) also costs 5 points.

Success means the creatures obey simple commands, like a well-trained dog. They attack foes and endanger their lives for their master. A @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise} on the arcane skill roll means the beasts are more obedient. They won’t kill themselves but overcome their natural fears (fire, fearful creatures, et.) to follow their orders.

Swarms can also be con­trolled. Small Swarms cost 1 point, Medium Swarms cost 2, and Large Swarms cost 3.

Beast friend works only on natural creatures with animal intelligence, not humanoids, and has no effect on conjured, magical, or otherwise “unnatural” animals.

Modifiers

See generic modifiers @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{here}

  • BESTIARIUM (+2): The caster may affect magical beasts with animal intelligence.
  • Duration (+1): The base Duration increases to 30 minutes.
  • Mind Rider (+1): The caster can communicate and sense through any of the beasts he currently has befriended.
chinese:
野兽同盟 BEAST FRIEND

位阶：入门

奇术点：特殊

射程：聪慧

持续时间：10分钟

学派：惑控系

特效：施术者集中精神并作出手势。

这个法术能让单位和自然野兽沟通并指挥其行动，施术费用等同于对象体型的总和(每个生物最少1点，例子参见章节六的生物)。举例而言，操控五只狼(体型-1)消耗5点；操控一头犀牛(体型5)也是消耗5点。

成功意味着这些生物会像是经过良好训练的狗一样遵从简单的指令，它们会为了主子冒着危险攻击敌人。奥法技能投骰获得优良意味着这些野兽会更为顺从，它们不会自杀，但愿意克服天然的恐惧(火焰、恐怖的生物等等)以执行命令。

集群也能予以操控。小型集群消耗1点，中型集群消耗2点，大型集群消耗3点。

野兽同盟只对具有动物智力的自然生物有效，对类人生物，变化生成，或是魔法性质的“非自然”动物无效。

调整

通用调整见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{此处}

  • 百兽通(+2)：施术者能影响具备动物智力的魔法兽。
  • 延长(+1)：基础持续时间增加到30分钟。
  • 心灵驾驭(+1)：施术者可以通过任何受术的野兽进行沟通和感知。

english:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02heavyweaponh00]{Heavy Weapon}. A wire-guided missile fired from a portable or vehicle-mounted launcher. Doesn’t require a lock—just a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} roll, and can’t be jammed. @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Area Effect Attacks]{Medium Blast Template}.

Unless otherwise noted, missiles must “lock” onto their targets before they can be fired. This action is an opposed @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Electronics]{Electronics} roll versus the target’s maneuvering skill (@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Boating]{Boating}, @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Driving]{Driving}, or @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Piloting]{Piloting}, as appropriate). Success gives the attacker a “short” lock and allows him to fire up to half the missiles his particular craft can fire at once. A raise is a more solid lock and allows him to fire all of them.

The enemy attempts to evade each missile separately by making a maneuvering roll at −4 (or −2 if the target has substantial cover to hide behind—such as asteroids, skyscrapers, canyon walls, or even large enemy ships. A @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Trait Rolls]{Critical Failure} means the craft goes @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-tables.Out of Control]{Out of Control}.

Anti-Missile Systems: Warships and futuristic space vessels often have “point defense” systems to shoot down incoming missiles. Operators must be on @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03hold0000000000]{Hold} to shoot down missiles; automated systems attack automatically. The system grants a single @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} roll per missile at Short @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02range000000000]{Range} and any other relevant modifiers (including @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03speed000000000]{Speed}—missiles move at Mach 1, a −6 penalty, unless otherwise noted). Unless otherwise noted, missiles are objects with a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Breaking Things]{Toughness} of 8 (2).
chinese:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02heavyweaponh00]{重武器}，可以通过便携发射器或是车载发射的线导导弹。不需要进行锁定———只须进行一次@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}投骰，而且不会出现故障。@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{中型爆发盖板}。

除非另有说明，导弹必须“锁定”目标后才能发射。这个行动是以@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Electronics]{电子学}对抗目标的机动技能(@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Boating]{驾船}，@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Driving]{驾驶}或是@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Piloting]{航空}，酌情而定)。成功意味着攻击方能“仓促”锁定目标并得以一次性发射装置上最多一半的导弹。获得优良则代表锁定更为充分，这时能全弹发射。

敌方能就每一枚导弹各自进行一次-4的机动投骰来尝试回避(如果目标有结实的掩体可供躲藏——比如小行星、大厦、崖壁甚至是大型敌舰，则只有-2)，@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{大失败}意味着载具@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-tables.Out of Control]{失控}。

反导弹系统：战舰和未来的太空船通常都有击落袭来导弹的“点防御”系统。操作员必须处于@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03hold0000000000]{待机}才能击落导弹。如果是自动系统则会自行发起攻击。该系统会对每枚导弹单独提供一次在短距@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02range000000000]{射程}进行@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}投骰的机会，并算入其他相关调整值(包括速度。除非另有说明，导弹@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03speed000000000]{速度}达到1马赫时会带来-6减值)。除非另有说明，导弹是@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{坚韧}为8(2)的物件。

english:
Grappling is an opposed roll between the attacker and defender’s @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics}. If the attacker wins, the foe is Entangled. With a raise, he’s Bound. (Success on a foe who was already Entangled makes him Bound.) See @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03boundandenta00]{Bound and Entangled}.

If a foe is Bound, the grappler is also @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03distractedan00]{Vulnerable} while maintaining his hold.

The @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03gangingup00000]{Ganging Up} bonus applies when grappling a defender, but other maneuvers don’t unless the Game Master rules otherwise in a specific situation.

Size Matters: If there’s a difference in Scale (see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{Size and Scale}) between the attacker and defender, the grappler subtracts the difference from his total (the defender does not).

Creatures may not generally grapple a foe more than two Sizes larger than themselves unless they have exceptional reach or @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Strength} for their Size (GM’s call).

Example: A dragon (Huge +4) tries to pin a half-folk thief (Normal). The difference between Huge and Normal Scales is 4, so the dragon must subtract 4 from its @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics} roll.
If an ogre (Normal) tries to wrestle a great white shark (Large +2), he must subtract 2 from his roll.

Crush: As an action, a grappler may make a Strength roll as damage against a target he has Entangled or Bound. (This is a damage roll so @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{Scale} modifiers are ignored.)
chinese:
擒抱

擒抱要求攻守双方进行一次@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}对抗投骰。若攻击方胜出，敌方会陷入纠缠。若获得优良，对方会陷入束缚(对已经遭到纠缠的敌方取得成功则会让其陷入束缚)。见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03boundandenta00]{束缚与纠缠}。

若是敌方遭到束缚，则擒抱方在维持擒抱期间也会陷入@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03distractedan00]{脆弱}。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03gangingup00000]{围攻}加值可以在擒抱防守方时生效，但除非GM在特定情境下另作判断，否则其他战技不会起作用。

体型问题：若攻守双方之间的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{尺寸}有所差别，擒抱方必须从总值中减去对应差值(防守方无须如此)。

生物通常无法擒抱体型比自身高2及以上的对手，除非其具备就自身体型而言格外杰出的触及或@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{力量}(取决于GM)。

例子：龙(超大型+4)尝试摁住一名半身人盗贼(中型)。超大型和中型的尺寸差值是4，因此龙必须在其@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}投骰中减去4。
如果食人魔(中型)，尝试擒住一头大白鲨(大型+2)，则其必须在投骰中减去2。

紧勒：擒抱方能在其回合内以一个行动进行一次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{力量}对抗投骰以对自己正@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03boundandenta00]{束缚或纠缠}的对象造成伤害。若获得成功，则进行第二次力量投骰以计算伤害(若在首次投骰中获得优良则还会带有@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03dealingdamag00]{奖励伤害})。

english:
Banish

See power @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Banish]{here}.

Rank: Veteran

Power Points: 3

Range: Smarts

Duration: Instant

School: Abjuration

Trappings: Holy items, arcane symbols, handful of salt.

Banish sends entities from other planes back to their native dimensions. This includes ghosts, demons, elementals, and similar beings (at the GM’s discretion).

Banishing a being is an opposed roll of the caster’s arcane skill versus the target’s Spirit. Success means the target is @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Shaken}, and each @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise} causes a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Wound}.

If this @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Incapacitates} the target it returns to its native plane of existence. Banished entities may return when the Game Master feels it’s appropriate, or even a few rounds later if the being has the ability to travel between planes on its own!

Modifiers

See generic modifiers @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{here}

  • Area of Effect (+1/+2/+3): The power affects everything in a Small, Medium, or Large Blast Template. See @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{area effect attacks} here.
chinese:
放逐 BANISH

位阶：老练

奇术点：3

射程：聪慧

持续时间：瞬间

学派：防护系

特效：圣物，奥法印记，一捧盐

放逐会将其他位面的实体送回它们本来的次元当中，这包括幽魂、恶魔、元素等类似的存在(由GM判定)。

放逐需要进行一次施术者的奥法技能VS目标心魂的对抗投骰。成功意味着目标遭受动摇，而且每次优良都会造成1个损伤。

若目标因此无力化，它就会返回原生的实存位面。遭到放逐的实体可以在GM认为合适的时候回归。若其具备独力穿行位面的能力，则甚至可以在几轮之后回归！

调整

通用调整见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{此处}

  • 范围效果(+1/+2/+3)：奇术能影响小型/中型/大型爆发盖板内的一切单位。

english:
Avion

Avions are humanoids with wings. They tend to be very slight of build owing to their hollow bones. Some are feathered while others are leathery or even scaled.

  • CAN'T SWIM: Avions’ wings are a hazard in water. They subtract 2 from @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics} (swimming) rolls and each inch moved in water costs them 3″ of Pace.
  • FLIGHT: Avions fly at @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{Pace} 12 per round. Use @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics} when maneuvering.
  • FRAIL: Avions have −1 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Toughness} due to their hollow bones.
  • KEEN SENSES: Avions are more perceptive than most. They begin with a d6 in @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Notice]{Notice} (instead of d4) and may raise the skill to d12+1.
  • REDUCED PACE: Dependence on flight and bulky wings make avions slightly slower when walking. Decrease their walking @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{Pace} by 1 and their running die by one step.
chinese:
翼民

翼民是有翅膀的类人种。他们的体格因为中空的骨头而脆弱轻盈。某些翼民双翅生羽，而其他的则是背长皮翼甚至是鳞翼。

  • 不谙水性：翼民的翅膀在水中百无一用。@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}(游泳)投骰-2，而且在水中每移动一英寸消耗3英寸移速。
  • 飞行：翼民每轮能以12的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{移速}飞行，并以@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}技能进行机动。
  • 羸弱：因为骨头中空，翼民的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{坚韧}-1。
  • 敏锐感官：翼民比起其他族裔更要敏锐，他们初始的@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Notice]{察觉}技能从d4变成d6，并且可以将该技能提升到d12+1。
  • 移速减少：因为对飞行的依赖以及笨重的翅膀，翼民在行走时较为迟缓，其行走@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{移速}-1，并且奔跑骰下降一级。

english:
