The cost to cast is equal to the sum of their @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Size and Scale]{Size} (minimum 1 per creature). Controlling five @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-bestiary.Dog / Wolf]{wolves} (Size −1) costs 5 points (remember the minimum cost of 1), for example. Controlling a rhino (Size 5) costs 5 points.

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Success} means the creatures obey simple commands, like a well-trained dog. They attack foes and endanger their lives for their master. A @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Trait Rolls]{raise} on the arcane skill roll means the beasts are more obedient. They won’t kill themselves but overcome their natural fears to follow their orders.

@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-bestiary.Swarm]{Swarms} can also be controlled. Small Swarms cost 1 point, Medium Swarms cost 2, and Large Swarms cost 3.

Beast friend works only on natural creatures with animal intelligence, not humanoids, and has no effect on conjured, magical, or otherwise “unnatural” animals.

Modifiers

  • Mind Rider (+1): The caster can communicate and sense through any of the beasts they've befriended.
chinese:
这个法术能让单位和自然野兽沟通并指挥其行动，施术费用等同于对象@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{体型}的总和(每个生物最少1点，例子参见章节六的生物)。举例而言，操控五只@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-bestiary.Dog/Wolf]{狼}(体型-1)消耗5点(记住费用下限是1点)；操控一头犀牛(体型5)也是消耗5点。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{成功}意味着这些生物会像是经过良好训练的狗一样遵从简单的指令，它们会为了主子冒着危险攻击敌人。奥法技能投骰出现@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{优良}意味着这些野兽会更为顺从，它们不会自杀，但愿意克服天然的恐惧以执行命令。

@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-bestiary.Swarm]{集群}也能予以操控。小型集群消耗1点，中型集群消耗2点，大型集群消耗3点。

野兽同盟 只对具有动物智力的自然生物有效，对类人种，变化生成，或是魔法性质的“非自然”动物无效。

调整

  • 心灵驾驭(+1)：施术者可以通过任何受术的野兽进行沟通和感知。

english:
Barrier

See power @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Barrier]{here}.

Rank: Seasoned

Power Points: 2

Range: Smarts

Duration: 5

School: Conjuration

Trappings: Fire, ice, thorns, bones, energy.

Barrier creates a straight wall 5″ (10 yards) long and 1″ (two yards) tall, of immobile material that conforms to the surface it’s cast upon. Double the length with a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}.

Thickness varies depending on what the wall is made of, but is usually a few inches.

The wall is Hardness 10 (or 12 with a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}), and may be destroyed as any other object (see @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Breaking Things}). Each @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Wound} destroys a 1" (2 yard) square section of wall (piercing weapons can't damage the barrier).

When the spell expires or the wall is broken it crumbles to dust or dissipates. Trap­pings are never left behind.

Modifiers

See generic modifiers @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{here}

  • Damage (+0/+1): The barrier causes 2d4 damage to anyone who contacts it. If the barrier is immaterial, such as with a wall of fire, this modifier costs +0 instead of +1.
  • Deadly (+2): The barrier causes 2d6 damage.
  • Hardened (+1): The wall is Hardness 12 (or 14 with a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}).
  • Shaped (+1): The barrier forms a circle, square, or rectangle. It can't have a roof or floor, and can't Bind or Entangle anything within (use the @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Entangle]{entangle} power for that).
  • Size (+1): The length and height of the barrier doubles.
chinese:
屏障 BARRIER

位阶：行家

奇术点：2

射程：聪慧

持续时间：5

学派：咒法系

特效：火焰、冰块、荆棘、骸骨、能量。

屏障会制造出一面5英寸(10码)长，1英寸(2码)高的平直墙体，构成静止墙体的材质和施放表面的材质一致，获得优良则长度加倍。

厚度取决于墙体材质构成，通常都是数英寸厚。

墙体的硬度是10(优良则是12)，而且和其他物件一样可以遭到摧毁(见130页破坏物体)，每个损伤能摧毁1平方英寸(2平方码)的墙体(穿刺武器无法对屏障造成伤害)。

法术消散或墙体遭到破坏时，其就会碎裂成灰或是消失不见，特效永远不会保留。

调整

通用调整见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{此处}

  • 伤害(+0/+1)：对任何接触屏障的单位造成2d4伤害。若是屏障并非实体(诸如火墙)，则此调整的消耗从+1变成+0。
  • 致死(+2)：屏障会造成2d6伤害。
  • 加固(+1)：墙体的硬度变为12(优良则是14)。
  • 塑形(+1)：屏障形态变为环形、方形或长方形，其不能带有顶部或底部，也不能束缚或纠缠住内部的任何事物(这要用纠缠奇术)。
  • 大小(+1)：屏障的长度和高度加倍。

english:
Baleful Polymorph

See power @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Baleful Polymorph]{here}.

Rank: Veteran

Power Points: 3+2 per point of size change

Range: Smarts

Duration: 5

School: Transmutation

Trappings: Cursed artifact, a bolt of energy.

Choose a creature with the @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-abilities.Animal (Type)]{Animal} type, from @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Size –2 to Size 3}. Baleful Polymorph is an @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{opposed roll} of the character's arcane skill versus the target's @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Spirit}. With a success, the victim changes into a relatively harmless creature. They gain the @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Agility}, @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Strength}, @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Vigor}, and innate abilities of the animal, but retain their own @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Smarts} and Spirit.

The target must be able to survive in its current environment while in its new form (you cannot turn someone into a fish while on dry land). If the victim @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{critically fails} the Spirit roll, they gain the Smarts of the animal as well, believing that they are an animal until the power ends. At the end of each of the victim's subsequent turns, he can make a Spirit roll at –2 (–4 if the caster got a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}) to return to his normal form.

Modifiers

See generic modifiers @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{here}

  • Duration (+2): The power's @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{Duration} is measured in minutes instead of rounds.
chinese:
恶意变形 BALEFUL POLYMORPH

位阶：老练

奇术点：3+2×变化体型数

射程：聪慧

持续时间：5

学派：变化系

特效：诅咒造物、能量束。

恶意变形是选择某一体型在-2到3之间的动物类别生物，然后进行一次角色的奥法技能VS目标心魂的对抗投骰。若是成功，则对象变成某种相对无害的生物，其会获得该生物的灵巧、力量、活力和内生能力，但仍然保持原来的聪慧以及心魂。

该目标处于新形态时必须能在当前环境中存活(无法将陆地上的某人变成鱼类)。若是对象心魂投骰大失败，则还会获得此类动物的聪慧，并在奇术结束之前相信自己就是动物。对象在自己接下来的每个回合结束时都能进行一次-2的心魂投骰(若是施术者获得优良则是-4)以尝试变回原来的形态。

调整

通用调整见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{此处}

  • 延长(+2)：奇术的持续时间从按轮计算变成按分钟计算。

english:
Aquarian

From the crushing ocean depths come aquatic folk. They are thick and sturdy beneath the waves but often vulnerable in the dry air or searing heat of the surface.

  • AQUATIC: Aquarians cannot drown in water and move at their full Pace when swimming. See @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{Movement} for normal swimming rates.
  • DEPENDENCY: Aquarians must immerse them­selves in water one hour out of every 24 or become automatically Fatigued each day until they are @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Incapacitated}. The day after Incapacitation from dehydration, they perish. Each hour spent in water restores one level of @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{Fatigue}.
  • LOW LIGHT VISION: Aquarians are used to the darkness of the depths. They ignore penalties for Dim and Dark @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{Illumination}.
  • TOUGHNESS: Life in the depths of their watery worlds has made aquarian flesh tough and resilient. Add +1 to their @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Toughness}.
chinese:
鲛人

鲛人来自水压惊人的大洋深处。他们在波涛底下强健自如，但在地表的干燥空气或是灼热高温中则会脆弱无比。

  • 水栖：鲛人不会溺水，而且游泳时能以全移速移动。常规游泳速度见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03movement000000]{移动}。
  • 依赖：鲛人每24小时必须将自己浸没在水中一小时，否则每天将会自动陷入疲乏，直到陷入无力化。他们因为脱水而@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{无力化}超过一天后，就会死亡。每泡在水中一小时能恢复一级@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{疲乏}。
  • 微光视觉：鲛人已经习惯了深海的黑暗，他们忽略因昏暗和黑暗@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{照明}造成的减值。
  • 坚韧：水世界深处的生活让鲛人的肉体强韧过人，@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{坚韧}+1。

english:
Half-elves

Half-elves gain the elves’ grace but none of their elegant frailty. Most are well-adjusted, but some are shunned by one side of the family or the other and grow resentful. Others may even be mistreated. Their lifespans are closer to their human parent than those of their elven kin, living only to about 100 years.

  • HERITAGE: Half-elves may retain the grace of their elven parent or the adaptability of their human ancestry. A half-elf may either start with a free Novice @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01edges000000000]{Edge} of his choice or a d6 in @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Agility} instead of a d4 (which also increases his Agility maximum to d12+1).
  • LOW LIGHT VISION: Half-elves ignore penalties for Dim and Dark @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{Illumination}.
  • OUTSIDER (Minor): Half-elves are never quite comfortable in human or elven society, having a foot in both worlds but never fully standing in either. They subtract 2 from @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{Persuasion} rolls with all but others of their kind.
chinese:
半精灵

半精灵保有了精灵的魅力，但丝毫没继承后者的优雅和纤细。大部分半精灵都能适应社会，但仍有一些被家庭中一方或是其他人所排斥，并滋长出了愤恨。甚至还有一些会惨遭虐待。半精灵的寿命与比起他们的精灵血亲更接近人类的双亲，只能活大概100年左右。

  • 传承：半精灵能保留其精灵家长的优雅或是人类血统的适应力。半精灵能在开始时随意选择一个免费的入门@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01edges000000000]{专长}，或是让初始@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{灵巧}从d4变成d6(灵巧上限提升到d12+1)。
  • 微光视觉：半精灵能忽略昏暗和黑暗造成的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{照明}减值。
  • 异客(次要)：半精灵在人类或者精灵社会中都会感到不自在，其在踏足两个世界的同时，却又永不属于任何一方。半精灵和其他任何非同族互动时的@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{交涉}投骰-2。

english:
Lasers fire intensely focused beams of light to penetrate and burn their targets.

Cauterize: Anyone Incapacitated by a laser blast adds +2 to his @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Vigor} rolls to keep from @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Bleeding Out}.

Overcharge: This weapon can overcharge to cause an extra d6 damage, but if any of the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} dice are a 1, the weapon must cool down for a full round before it can be fired again.

No Recoil: Pistols, SMGs, and rifles ignore the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{Recoil} penalty. Gatling lasers still take the penalty, however, which is why they’re usually mounted on a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{tripod}.
chinese:
激光武器会射出密集的光束来击穿并烧灼目标。

烧灼：任何被激光击中导致无力化的角色其进行避免@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{失血}的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{活力}投骰+2。

超载：该武器能通过超载来造成额外的d6伤害，但如果任意@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}骰出1，则武器必须冷却一整轮后才能继续射击。

无后座：激光手枪、激光冲锋枪和激光步枪忽略@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{后坐力}减值。然而加特林激光枪仍然会带有减值，这也是为什么其经常会架设在@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{三脚架}上。

english: Grapeshot or canister is a shell that detonates inside the barrel of a cannon and fires out a spray of deadly balls or other debris like a giant shotgun. The attack is the size of a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{Medium Blast Template} and moves in a straight line up to 24” (it affects [[/r d6]] targets if not using miniatures, or [[/r 2d6]] if they’re tightly packed). Compare the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} roll to every target within using a base TN of 4, adjusted for each target’s cover, special abilities like the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Dodge]{Dodge} Edge, etc. A hit causes 2d6 damage and a raise causes 3d6.
chinese:
葡萄弹或是霰弹是一种会在加农炮管内爆炸的炮弹，其会像巨型霰弹枪一样射出一片致命的金属球或是其他碎片。这属于@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{中型爆发盖板}攻击，并且至多会直线移动到24英寸远(如果不使用棋子则是会影响[[/r d6]]个目标，如果对方特别紧凑则是影响[[/r 2d6]]个目标)

每个目标根据@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}投骰单独结算，使用基础TN(4)并算上各目标的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{掩蔽}以及诸如@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Dodge]{闪避}专长之类的特殊能力等所带来的调整值。成功命中造成2d6伤害，获得优良则是3d6伤害。

english:
The archer gains two new qualities:

Imbue: Once per turn, the archer can imbue any area effect power into an arrow, "casting" the spell with @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} and using his bow's Range in place of the power's Range. The spell's area of effect is centered where the arrow lands, even if it must normally be centered on the caster. If the arrow misses, the spell fails. Imbued spells can't be Shorted or use the Range modifier.

Death Arrow: Once per day, the archer can fire a fearsome arrow thrumming with deadly energy. A target Shaken or Wounded by the arrow must make a Vigor roll or die! Death arrows have no effect on constructs or undead.
chinese:
魔射手获得两项新的特质：

  • 灌法：每回合一次，魔射手能够将任何范围效果类奇术灌注于一枚箭矢中，并以射击来“施放”这个法术，使用弓的射程取代奇术原本的射程。法术的效果范围将以箭矢的落点为中心，即便这通常是必须以施法者为中心也是如此。如果箭矢射失，则法术失效。灌注的法术不能进行减耗或应用射程调整。
  • 死亡箭：每天一次，魔射手能够射出一枚满盈死亡能量的可怕箭矢。因这枚箭矢而遭受动摇或损伤的目标必须成功通过一次活力投骰，否则就会死亡！死亡箭对构装体或不死生物无效。

english:
A bizarre and alien legacy taints the sorcerer’s blood. Her strange form increases her Toughness by +1. @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Bolt]{Bolt}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Blast]{blast}, and @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Burst]{burst} spells must be cast with the Lingering Damage @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{Power Modifier}, but cost the sorcerer only 1 additional @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-edges.Power Points]{Power Point} instead of 2.

Finally, her long limbs give her Reach +1. In addition to allowing the sorcerer to attack at a distance, this can be used for determining a spell’s Range or origin.

  • Advanced Form: The character is never @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Surprised} and is immune to @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{the Drop} unless @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Bound}. Her alien form grants her another point of Toughness.
chinese:
术士的血脉遭到了奇诡异形残余的玷污。术士的奇怪形态会让坚韧+1，施放矢弹、爆发和爆裂法术时必须带有持续伤害奇术调整(170页)，但术士额外消耗的奇术点从2点变成1点。然后，术士的增长肢体会让触及+1，除了能在远处攻击之外，还能用于决定法术的射程或源点。

  • 高级形态：此角色永远不会遭到突袭，而且除非遭到束缚，否则还会免疫奇袭。术士的怪异形态会让坚韧再+1。

english:
Guardians

Those humans who serve the Heavenly Choir are called guardians.

  • ADAPTABLE: Guardians begin play with any Novice Edge of their choosing (meeting its Requirements as usual).
  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Champion]{CHAMPIONS}: Guardians have the Champion Edge, giving them a +2 bonus to damage against supernaturally evil foes such as demons and devils.
  • VIGOROUS: Those humans who have inherited this blasted Earth start the game with a d6 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Vigor} instead of a d4. This increases their Vigor maximum to d12+1.
  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Vow]{VOW} (Major — Protect humanity): The blessed must protect the flock that remains on the ravaged Earth.
chinese:
圣卫

为天堂至善而效力的人类被称为圣卫。

  • 适应：圣卫在游戏开始时可任选一个入门专长(须如常满足需求)。
  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Champion]{勇士}：圣卫具有勇士专长，让其在对抗诸如恶魔以及魔鬼这类超自然邪恶秽物时在伤害上获得+2加值。
  • 体魄强盛：在奄奄一息的地球上繁衍的人类在游戏开始时的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{活力}从d4变成d6，这让其活力上限提升到d12+1。
  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Vow]{誓言}(主要——保护人类)：神佑者必须保护地球上幸存的民众。

english:
Arcane Protection

See power @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Arcane Protection]{here}.

Rank: Novice

Power Points: 1

Range: Smarts

Duration: 5

School: Abjuration

Trappings: Concentration, a dull glow around the protected character, a fetish.

Success with arcane protection means hostile powers suffer a −2 penalty (−4 with a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}) to affect this character. If the power causes harm, damage is also reduced a like amount.

Arcane protection stacks with @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-edges.Arcane Resistance]{Arcane Resistance} should the recipient have both!

Modifiers

See generic modifiers @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{here}

  • Additional Recipients (+1): The power may affect more than one target for 1 additional Power Point each.
  • Greater ARCANE PROTECTION (+2): Hostile powers suffer a −4 penalty (−6 with a @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{raise}).
chinese:
奥法防护 ARCANE PROTECTION

位阶：入门

奇术点：1

射程：聪慧

持续时间：5

学派：防护系

特效：聚能，围绕在防护对象周围的模糊光线，法物。

成功施放的奥法防护意味着试图影响角色的敌性奇术遭受-2减值(优良则是-4)。若奇术会造成伤害，则伤害也会减少对应数值。

若对象同时具备奥法防护和奥法抗性，两者可以叠加！

调整

通用调整见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powermodifie00]{此处}

  • 额外对象(+1)：每额外消耗1奇术点，该奇术可以多影响1个目标。
  • 高等奥法防护(+2)：敌性奇术遭受-4减值(优良则是-6)。

english:
A character can try to make an opponent drop a weapon (or other object) or attempt to damage it, by making a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03attacks0000000]{melee or ranged attack}.

The attacker must first hit the object or the opponent’s limb or hand (see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03calledshots000]{Called Shots})

If the attack hits the weapon, the attacker rolls damage normally for an item (no raise effect or Aces, see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{Breaking Things}). The defender must make a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Strength} roll equal to the damage or drop the item.

If the attack is against the wielder and @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Shakes or Wounds} him, the defender must make a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Strength} roll at −2 if it hit his limb, or −4 if it hit his hand, plus any Wound penalties that result as usual. Failure means he drops whatever item is in that hand.
chinese:
缴械

角色能通过@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03attacks0000000]{近战或远程攻击}尝试让对手丢下武器(或别的物件)或是对此物造成伤害。

攻击方必须首先攻击到物件、对象的肢体或是手部(见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03calledshots000]{定点打击})。

若此攻击命中该武器，攻击方如常就物品进行伤害投骰(不含优良效果或是绝佳，见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{破坏物体})，防守方必须成功通过一次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{力量}投骰(等同于此伤害)，否则就要丢下该物品。

若该攻击针对的是持用者且让其@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{遭受动摇或损伤}，则命中肢体时防守方必须进行一次-2的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{力量}投骰，倘若命中手部则是-4，此外结果还要如常加上任何损伤减值。失败则意味着其要丢下对应手持有的任何东西。

english:
Banish sends entities from immaterial planes back to their native dimensions. This includes ghosts, demons, elementals, and similar beings (at the GM’s discretion).

Banishing a being is an @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Trait Rolls]{opposed roll} of the caster’s arcane skill versus the target’s @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Spirit}. @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Success} means the target is @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Shaken}, and each @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{raise} causes a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Wound}.

If this @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Incapacitates} the target it returns to its native plane of existence. Banished entities may return when the Game Master feels it’s appropriate, such as the next full moon, when summoned again, or even a few rounds later if it’s a particularly powerful creature under the right conditions or in a location of power.
chinese:
放逐 会将非物质位面的实体送回它们本来的次元当中，这包括鬼魂、恶魔、元素等类似的存在(由GM判定)。

放逐 需要进行一次施术者奥法技能VS目标@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{心魂}的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{对抗投骰}。@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{成功}意味着目标遭受@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{动摇}，而且每次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{优良}都会造成1个@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{损伤}。

若目标因此@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{无力化}，它就会返回原生的实存位面。遭到放逐 的实体可以在GM认为合适的时候(下一次满月、再次遭到召唤)回归。若这属于非常强大的生物，而且具备合适的条件或处于能量丰盈的地点时，甚至还可以在几轮之后回归。

english:
This is an ordinary house cat, the sort that might be a familiar for a spellcaster, a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Beast Master]{Beast Master}’s animal friend, or an alternate form for the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-powers.Shape Change]{shape change} power.

Special Abilities:

  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Special Ability (Low Light Vision)]{Low Light Vision}: Cats ignore penalties for Dim and Dark @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Illumination]{Illumination}.
  • @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Special Ability (Size)]{Size} −3 (Very Small): Cats are typically less than a foot high.
chinese:
这是普通的家猫，其可以作为施法者的使魔，@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Beast Master]{野兽大师}的动物伙伴或者是@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-powers.Shape Change]{化形}奇术的一种变化形态。

特殊能力：

  • @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor06bestia.JournalEntryPage.06specialabili20]{微光视觉}：猫忽略昏暗与黑暗的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03illumination00]{照明}减值。
  • @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor06bestia.JournalEntryPage.06specialabili25]{体型}−3 (超小型)：猫通常不到一英尺高。

english:
(MINOR OR MAJOR)

The hero is 12–15 years old (in human years—adjust this for other races). He has only 4 points to adjust his @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{attributes} instead of 5, and 10 skill points instead of 12. He may also have legal restrictions depending on the setting (can’t drive, own a firearm, and so on).

On the plus side, youths have a fair amount of luck. They draw one extra @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03bennies0000000]{Benny} at the beginning of each game session (this stacks with other @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01edges000000000]{Edges} such @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Luck]{Luck} or @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Great Luck]{Great Luck}).

Most Young characters should also take the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Small]{Small} @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01hindrances0000]{Hindrance}, but it’s not mandatory.

As a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Major} @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01hindrances0000]{Hindrance}, the character is Very Young (8 to 11 years old). He has only 3 points for @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{attributes} and 10 for skills, and the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Small]{Small} Hindrance. Very Young heroes draw two extra @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03bennies0000000]{Bennies} at the start of each session.
chinese:
(次要或主要)

角色只有12-15岁(人类年龄——其他族裔需要予以调整)，其用于调整@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{属性}的点数从5点变成4点，技能点也从12点变成10点，同时根据设定还可能会受到法律约束(无法开车，不能持枪等等)。

好的方面是，小年轻的运气也要更好。其在每回游戏开始时都会额外获得1点@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03bennies0000000]{助力点}这会和@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Luck]{幸运}或@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Great Luck]{高等幸运}等其他@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01edges000000000]{专长}叠加)。

大多数年幼的角色应当同时获得@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Small]{小个子}@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01hindrances0000]{负赘}，但这并非绝对。

若为@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{主要}@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01hindrances0000]{负赘}，则角色会非常年幼(8-11岁)，只有3点@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{属性点}以及10点技能点，同时带有@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-hindrances.Small]{小个子}负赘。非常年幼的角色每回游戏开始时额外获得2点@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03bennies0000000]{助力点}。

english:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Wounded} characters make a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Vigor} roll every five days. Success recovers one Wounds, and a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{raise} recovers two.

A @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Critical Failure} increases the victim’s @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Wounds} level by one—either from infection, blood loss, or aggravating the injuries. If this causes @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{Incapacitation}, don’t use the usual rules for taking damage. Instead, the victim lapses in and out of consciousness and makes a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Vigor} roll every 12 hours. If the roll is failed, he expires. Success means he must roll again 12 hours later. With a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{raise} he stabilizes and wakes. Allies may also attempt to stabilize the hero as explained under Bleeding Out, above.

Support: Don’t forget to use @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03support0000000]{Support} when your party has been beaten up a bit. Characters with @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Healing]{Healing}, @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Survival]{Survival}, or other skills can make Support rolls to help allies make their @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Vigor} rolls to heal!
chinese:
受到@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{损伤}的角色每五天进行一次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{活力}投骰。成功则移除1个损伤，@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{优良}移除2个。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{大失败}会让对象的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{损伤}增加一级——可能是感染、失血过多、伤口恶化等导致。若因此导致@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{无力化}，不要采用平时受到伤害时的规则。相反，对象的意识时有时无，并且每12小时进行一次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{活力}投骰，失败就会死亡，成功意味着12小时后必须再进行投骰，出现@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{优良}则角色才能得以稳定并恢复意识。盟友也可以如同失血中所述的那般尝试稳定这名角色的伤势。

援助：别忘了在团队挨了一顿揍后使用@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03support0000000]{援助}。具备@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Healing]{治疗}、@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Survival]{生存}或其他技能的角色可以使用援助投骰来帮助同伴进行@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{活力}投骰以便恢复！

english:
Minimum @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Rate of Fire]{Rate of Fire} 3, requires backpack harness with ammo which weighs an additional 85 pounds when full (carries 4000 linked rounds).

Machine guns are heavy, fully automatic weapons built to withstand prolonged fire. Most are fed by belts or drums and thus have far more ammo capacity than assault rifles, despite similar calibers and rates of fire.

Weapon Mount: Most machine-guns require a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{Bipod/Tripod} or vehicle mount to fire, which eliminates any Strength requirement and the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{Recoil} penalty. Their @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02minimumstren00]{Minimum Strength} is listed as “NA,” or “Not Applicable.” If a weapon has a Minimum Strength listed, it may be fired from the hip with the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{Snapfire} and Recoil penalties.

Reloading: Machine guns are @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02reload00000000]{Reload} 2, which includes changing belts or drums, cocking, etc.
chinese:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02rateoffire0000]{射速}下限3，需要额外准备满装填重达85磅的背负式供弹箱(内装4000发弹链式子弹)。

机枪是沉重的全自动武器，在设计上用于持续提供长时间的火力输出，其大部分需要弹链或是弹鼓进行装填，因此尽管口径和射速和突击步枪差不多，但弹容量要胜出一筹。

武器架：大部分机枪都需要架设在@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{双脚架/三脚架}或是载具上开火，这样可以免于任何力量需求以及@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{后坐力}减值。机枪的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02minimumstren00]{最低力量}一般是“NA”，或是“不适用”。如果这把武器的确列出了最低力量，那就可以提在腰间开火，但是会带有@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{猝射}及后坐力减值。

装填：机枪的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02reload00000000]{装填}是2，包括更换弹链、弹鼓以及拉栓等等。

english:
Specialists must choose one favored school and two opposition schools from the list @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{here}. They gain a free reroll on arcane skill rolls to cast spells (not activating an item) from their favored school, but spells cast from their opposition school cost one additional Power Point and suffer a −2 penalty to the wizard's arcane skill roll.
Wizards mark opposition spells in their power lists with an asterisk, like this: banish*.

This is the school of protective magic. It's used to prevent harm and suppress other spells. @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Arcane Protection]{Arcane protection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Banish]{banish}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Damage Field]{damage field}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Dispel]{dispel}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Deflection]{deflection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Protection]{protection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Sanctuary]{sanctuary}.

@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{See Schools of Magic for more}.
chinese:
专精法师必须在@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{这里}的列表中选择一个偏好学派和两个对立学派，在施放偏好学派的法术(而非启动物品)时奥法技能投骰免费获得一次重投，但施放对立学派的法术时需要额外消耗1奇术点，且奥法技能投骰会遭受-2。法师会在他们的奇术列表中以星号标记对立法术，像这样：放逐*。

防护系：用于避免损害或是压制其他法术的防护性魔法学派。奥法防护、放逐、破袪、偏斜、环境防护、防护、庇护。

详见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{魔法学派}。

english:
Specialists must choose one favored school and two opposition schools from the list @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{here}. They gain a free reroll on arcane skill rolls to cast spells (not activating an item) from their favored school, but spells cast from their opposition school cost one additional Power Point and suffer a −2 penalty to the wizard's arcane skill roll.
Wizards mark opposition spells in their power lists with an asterisk, like this: banish*.

This is the school of protective magic. It's used to prevent harm and suppress other spells. @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Arcane Protection]{Arcane protection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Banish]{banish}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Damage Field]{damage field}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Dispel]{dispel}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Deflection]{deflection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Protection]{protection}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Sanctuary]{sanctuary}.

@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{See Schools of Magic for more}.
chinese:
专精法师必须在@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{这里}的列表中选择一个偏好学派和两个对立学派，在施放偏好学派的法术(而非启动物品)时奥法技能投骰免费获得一次重投，但施放对立学派的法术时需要额外消耗1奇术点，且奥法技能投骰会遭受-2。法师会在他们的奇术列表中以星号标记对立法术，像这样：放逐*。

防护系：用于避免损害或是压制其他法术的防护性魔法学派。奥法防护、放逐、破袪、偏斜、环境防护、防护、庇护。

详见@UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05schoolsofmag00]{魔法学派}。

english:
The hero knows one unique weapon (Excalibur, Old Betsy, Sting) like the back of his hand. When using it, he adds +1 to his @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{Athletics} (throwing), @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Fighting]{Fighting}, or @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting} rolls, and +1 to @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Parry} when readied (even if it’s a ranged weapon).

A fighter can take this Edge multiple times, applying it to a different weapon each time. If a Trademark Weapon is lost, he can replace it but the benefits don’t kick in for a few days (however long the GM feels is dramatically appropriate).
chinese:
这名角色对一件独有武器如臂指使(譬如亚瑟王的湖中剑、大卫·克洛科特的爱枪老贝西、比尔博的刺针剑)。使用此武器时，@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Athletics]{运动}(投掷)、@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Fighting]{格斗}或@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}投骰获得+1，并且在预备完毕时(即便是远程武器)还能让@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{格挡}获得+1。

角色可以多次选择该专长，每次都要应用到不同的武器上。若招牌武器遗失，角色可以更换一把，但数天内不会有所好处(或是由GM根据剧情决定一个合适的时长)。

english:
Generations ago, a demon corrupted the hero’s heritage. She has environmental resistance to electricity, +1 Toughness, and sharp claws that cause Str+d4 damage.

  • Advanced Form: The abyssal can conjure demons to aid her. The cost for @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Summon Ally]{summon ally} is reduced by 2 (to a minimum of 1), and the entities summoned cause @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore04theadv.JournalEntryPage.04fear0000000000]{Fear}. She also gains @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-abilities.Environmental Resistance]{environmental resistance} to cold and fire.
chinese:
某位恶魔在数代以前污染了角色的传承。角色获得电环境抗性，+1坚韧，以及能造成力量+d4伤害的利爪。

  • 高级形态：深渊可以召来恶魔予以协助。召唤盟友的消耗减少2(下限为1)，且召唤出的实体会造成恐惧。术士还会获得寒冷和火焰环境抗性。

english:
Machine guns are heavy, fully automatic weapons built to withstand prolonged fire. Most are fed by belts or drums and thus have far more ammo capacity than assault rifles, despite similar calibers and rates of fire.

Weapon Mount: Most machine-guns require a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{Bipod/Tripod} or vehicle mount to fire, which eliminates any Strength requirement and the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{Recoil} penalty. Their @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02minimumstren00]{Minimum Strength} is listed as “NA,” or “Not Applicable.” If a weapon has a Minimum Strength listed, it may be fired from the hip with the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{Snapfire} and Recoil penalties.

Minimum Rate of Fire: Machine-guns have a minimum @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Rate of Fire]{Rate of Fire} of 2 unless otherwise noted.

Reloading: Machine guns are @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02reload00000000]{Reload} 2, which includes changing belts or drums, cocking, etc.
chinese:
机枪是沉重的全自动武器，在设计上用于持续提供长时间的火力输出，其大部分需要弹链或是弹鼓进行装填，因此尽管口径和射速和突击步枪差不多，但弹容量要胜出一筹。

武器架：大部分机枪都需要架设在@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-equipment.Bipod/Tripod]{双脚架/三脚架}或是载具上开火，这样可以免于任何力量需求以及@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03recoil00000000]{后坐力}减值。机枪的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02minimumstren00]{最低力量}一般是“NA”，或是“不适用”。如果这把武器的确列出了最低力量，那就可以提在腰间开火，但是会带有@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{猝射}及后坐力减值。

最低射速：除非另有说明，否则机枪的最低@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02rateoffire0000]{射速}是2。

装填：机枪的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02reload00000000]{装填}是2，包括更换弹链、弹鼓以及拉栓等等。

english:
Characters use @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{Persuasion} to socialize within their various social circles for information or favors. When used in this way, Persuasion isn’t a single exchange but several hours of networking, hobnobbing, carousing, drinks, gifts, bribes, or entertaining. This might represent time at the office, a series of meetings with important people, or (most commonly) an evening of dinner and drinks.

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Success} grants most of what the character wants, though it may take a while, cost some money, or require a favor in return. A @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{raise} either gets more of whatever he was looking for, or at a lower cost.

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Failure} means the hero’s efforts are in vain. A @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{Critical Failure} means he’s cut off from that particular group for a while (up to the GM but typically about a week). 

Money Talks: You can catch more flies with honey than vinegar, the saying goes. A character with a little lucre to spread around adds +2 to her networking attempt by spending money on better bribes, gifts, or wining and dining her contacts.

The amount required is up to the GM, the setting, and the nature of the contact(s) she interacts with. As a rule of thumb, use the setting’s Starting Funds and modify as appropriate from there.
chinese:
角色通过@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{交涉}与各种社交圈进行往来以获得信息或帮助。当这样使用时，交涉就并非是单次的互动，而是数小时的社交、聊天、盛宴、畅饮、赠礼、行贿或娱乐。这代表花在办公室里的时间，一系列与要人的会面，或是一场菜肴酒水齐备的晚宴(最为常见)。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{成功}会让角色得到大部分想获得的东西，尽管可能花上了好一阵子，破了点费，或是欠下了需要偿还的人情。获得优良则要么是会获得更多所求的东西，要么是付出了更少的代价。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{失败}代表角色是白费力气，大失败则意味着他暂时中断了和某个团体的往来(取决于GM，但通常是一周)。

有钱能使鬼推磨：俗话说得好，为人大方朋友广。有条件慷慨解囊的角色可以把钱花在更丰厚的贿赂、礼物或是交际时的餐饮上，以让其打点关系的尝试+2。

所要花费的金钱数量取决于GM、设定以及其参与交际的性质。大概的规则是，使用设定的起始资金，并在此之上进行适当调整。

english:
(MINOR OR MAJOR)

Your warrior has an annoying or dangerous compulsion. A @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Minor} Habit irritates those around her but isn’t dangerous. Maybe she picks her nose, can’t stop fiddling with her phone, says “y’know” in the middle of every sentence, or chews and smacks her gum loudly and often. Allies avoid her if possible.

A @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Major} Habit is a physical or mental addiction of some sort that is debilitating or possibly even deadly. This includes drug use, chronic drinking, or perhaps even an addiction to virtual reality in a hightech setting.

An addict who doesn’t get his fix must make a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Vigor} roll every 24 hours he goes without or take a level of @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{Fatigue}.

Once every 24 hours, a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Healing]{Healing} roll with some sort of appropriate medicine removes one level of @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{Fatigue} for four hours. After that the Fatigue returns and can only be recovered with the addicting substance.
chinese:
(次要或主要)

角色有着烦人或危险的积习。@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{次要}陋习会让旁人不悦，但并不危险。比如挖鼻孔，不停玩手机，每句话中间都加上“对伐”，或经常大声吧唧吧唧地嚼口香糖。盟友们会尽量敬而远之。

@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{主要}陋习则是某种会导致衰弱乃至死亡的生理或是心理成瘾，这包括吸毒、酗酒，甚至是高科技设定里面的虚拟现实成瘾。

若是瘾君子没有得到满足，则其每停用24小时就必须成功通过一次@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{活力}投骰，否则就会遭受一级@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{疲乏}。

每24小时一次，配合适当的药物治疗以及一次@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Healing]{治疗}投骰可以在四小时内暂时移除一级@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03fatigue0000000]{疲乏}。在此之后疲乏会卷土重来，只有藉由满足瘾头才能得以恢复。

english:
Amulet of Natural Armor

This amulet, usually crafted from bone or beast scales, toughens the wearer’s body and flesh. The wearer gains a bonus to @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Soak Rolls} rolls. The bonus is +1 (minor) or +2 (major).

Price: 18,000 gp (minor), 32,000 (major); Weight: —.

Craft: @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Boost/Lower Trait]{Boost Trait}; 9,000 gp (minor), 18,000 (major).
chinese:
这枚通常由骨头或兽鳞打造的护符会使佩戴者的肉体更为坚韧。佩戴者的化解投骰会获得加值，该加值为+1(次级)或+2(高级)。

价格：18,000gp(次级)、32,000gp(高级)；重量：—。

制作：强化特性；9,000gp(次级)、18,000gp(高级)。

english:
Amulet of Natural Armor

This amulet, usually crafted from bone or beast scales, toughens the wearer’s body and flesh. The wearer gains a bonus to @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Soak Rolls} rolls. The bonus is +1 (minor) or +2 (major).

Price: 18,000 gp (minor), 32,000 (major); Weight: —.

Craft: @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Boost/Lower Trait]{Boost Trait}; 9,000 gp (minor), 18,000 (major).
chinese:
这枚通常由骨头或兽鳞打造的护符会使佩戴者的肉体更为坚韧。佩戴者的化解投骰会获得加值，该加值为+1(次级)或+2(高级)。

价格：18,000gp(次级)、32,000gp(高级)；重量：—。

制作：强化特性；9,000gp(次级)、18,000gp(高级)。

english:
Many humanoids have universal features common to their ancestry. These include special @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore05powers.JournalEntryPage.05powers00000001]{abilities}, @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01edges000000000]{Edges}, and @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01hindrances0000]{Hindrances}. Goblins have @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-abilities.Darkvision]{Darkvision}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-abilities.Size]{Size} −1, and @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-hindrances.Greedy]{Greedy} (Major), for example. Some non-humanoids and other creature types may also have a universal set of features— such as archons, demons, and devils— when there are different versions within a creature category.

Instead of listing each of these features separately, they are listed together in one bullet in the creature’s stat block, such as “Ancestry (Goblin)” or “Archons.”
chinese: 大部分类人生物都具备在同一族裔中颇为普遍的特殊能力，专长和负赘。举例而言，地精具备黑暗视觉，体型-1和贪婪(主要)。其他非类人生物和生物类别在同一分类下的不同变体当中也能具有通用的特征组合——诸如亚空天族，恶魔和魔鬼等等。这些特征不会单独列出，而是在生物数值的某一条目下展示，诸如"族裔(地精)"这样。

english:
Although rare on Golarion, Driving allows a hero to control any powered ground vehicle. Self-powered transports use @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Athletics]{Athletics}, while beast-drawn conveyances use @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Riding]{Riding}.

Driving rolls are typically only needed in dangerous or stressful conditions, such as @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{chases} or when navigating dangerous roads or attempting to race through crowded city streets.
chinese: 驾驶能让角色得以控制任何带动力装置的陆行载具（尽管在格拉里昂上并不多见），人力驱动的交通工具使用的是运动，而畜力交通工具使用的是骑乘。通常只有在危险或是有压力的情况下才需要进行驾驶投骰，诸如追逐、在危险道路上行驶或是竞速穿越拥挤的城市街道。

english:
Barrier creates a straight wall 5″ (10 yards) long and 1″ (two yards) tall, of immobile material that conforms to the surface it’s cast upon. Thickness varies depending on what the wall is made of, but is usually a few inches.

The wall has a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{Hardness} of 10, and may be destroyed as any other object (see @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Breaking Things]{Breaking Things}).

When the spell expires or the wall is broken it crumbles to dust or dissipates. @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor05powers.JournalEntryPage.05trappings00000]{Trappings} are never left behind.

Modifiers

  • Damage (+1): The barrier causes 2d4 damage to anyone who contacts it
  • Hardened (+1): The wall is @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{Hardness} 12.
  • Shaped (+2): The barrier forms a circle, square or other basic shape.
  • Size (+1): The length and height of the barrier doubles.
chinese:
屏障 会制造出一面5英寸(10码)长，1英寸(2码)高的平直墙体，构成静止墙体的材质和施放表面的材质一致。

墙体的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{硬度}是10(优良则是12)，而且和其他物品一样可以遭到摧毁(见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{破坏物体})。

法术终止或墙体遭到破坏时，其就会碎裂成灰或是消失不见，@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor05powers.JournalEntryPage.05trappings00000]{特效}永远不会保留。

调整

  • 伤害(+1)：对任何接触屏障的单位造成2d4伤害。
  • 加固(+1)：墙的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{硬度}变为12(优良则是 14)。
  • 塑形(+2)：屏障形态变为环形、方形或别的基本形状。
  • 大小(+1)：屏障的长度和高度加倍。

english:
Success with arcane protection means hostile powers suffer a −2 penalty (−4 with a raise) to affect this character. If the hostile power fails to affect the target due to this penalty, it still activates and consumes Power Points (and may still affect other targets). If the power causes harm, damage is also reduced a like amount for the protected target.

Arcane protection stacks with @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Item.DmK4f86PtcCZPweS]{Arcane Resistance} should the recipient have both!

Modifiers

  • Additional Recipients (+1): The power may affect more than one target for 1 additional @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor05powers.JournalEntryPage.05arcanebackgr00]{Power Point} each.
chinese:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{成功}施放的奥法防护意味着试图影响角色的敌性奇术遭受-2@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03traitrolls0000]{减值}(优良则是-4)。

如果敌性奇术因此减值而无法影响目标，其仍会启动并消耗奇术点(仍有可能影响其他目标)。若这种奇术会造成@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03damageeffect00]{伤害}，防护目标遭受的伤害也会减少对应数值。若对象同时具备奥法防护和@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-edges.Arcane Resistance]{奥法抗性}专长，两者可以叠加！

调整

  • 额外对象(+1)：每额外消耗1@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor05powers.JournalEntryPage.05arcanebackgr00]{奇术点}，该奇术可以多影响1个目标。

english: Athletics combines an individual’s coordination with learned skills such as climbing, jumping, balancing, wrestling, swimming, throwing, or catching. Characters who rely on physical power more than coordination can take the @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-edges.Brute]{Brute} Edge to link this skill to @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Strength} instead of @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traitsummari00]{Agility}.
chinese: 运动包含人物在攀爬、跳跃、平衡、骑车、摔跤、滑雪、游泳、投掷或是抓捕这类习得技能上的协调能力。相较协调性更依仗身体力量的角色能通过蛮勇专长（41页）将技能关联到力量上（取代敏捷）。

english:
Blast launches a ball of explosive energy or matter. The area of effect is a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{Medium Blast Template}. Every target within suffers 2d6 damage, or 3d6 with a raise (see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{Area Effect Attacks})

Modifiers

  • Area Effect (+0/+1): The caster can focus the blast to a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{Small Blast Template} for no extra cost, or a @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Area Effect Attacks]{Large Blast Template} for +1
  • Damage (+2): The blast causes 3d6 damage (4d6 with a raise).
chinese:
爆发 会发射一团爆炸的能量或物质。效果范围是@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{中型爆发盖板}，其中的每个目标都会受到2d6伤害，优良则是3d6(见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{范围效果攻击})

调整

  • 范围效果(+0/+1)：施术者可将爆发 改为@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{小型爆发盖板}而无须额外费用，或+1消耗变成@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{大型爆发盖板}。
  • 伤害(+2)：爆发 造成的伤害为3d6(优良则为4d6)。

english:
Electronics allows a hero to use complex or specialized devices such as the control panels on industrial machines or the sensor systems found on spaceships in futuristic settings.

Consumer or electronic devices common to the setting don’t require Electronics— @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Common Knowledge]{Common Knowledge} suffices if a roll is required at all. In the modern world, this applies to video recorders, cell phones, etc.

Fixing any type of broken electronic device uses the @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Repair]{Repair} skill.
chinese:
电子学让角色得以使用复杂或是专业化设备，诸如控制面板、工业机械，或是未来设定中太空船上的传感系统。

在设定中普及的电子装置或是家用电器不需要用到电子学，若是需要投骰，使用@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Common Knowledge]{通用知识}足矣。现代世设中的摄像机以及手机之类的也同理。

修理任意损坏的电子设备需要用到@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Repair]{修理}技能。

english: A few creatures possess the remarkable ability to see in all directions, usually because of unique physical features. Creatures with All-Around Vision ignore one point of @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03situationalr00]{Gang Up} bonuses, add +2 to @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Notice]{Notice} rolls made to resist attacks from @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Stealth]{Stealth}, and cannot be the target of a Sneak Attack.
chinese: 某些生物具备看向所有方向的能力(通常是因为独特的身体特征所致)，具备全域视野的生物忽略一点围攻加值，抵抗潜行攻击的察觉投骰+2，并且不能成为偷袭的目标。

english:
Shields add to a character’s @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Parry} as shown in the Parry rating. @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{Cover} subtracts from ranged attacks from the front and shielded side (attacks from the rear or unprotected side ignore cover).

Medieval shields are @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{Hardness} 10 and provide +2 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02armor000000000]{Armor} should someone attempt to shoot through them (see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{Obstacles}).

While worn, shields can be used to bash for Str+d4 damage.
chinese:
盾牌会让角色的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{格挡}获得如下加值。来自正面及持盾侧的远程攻击遭受@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{掩蔽}减值(从背后或无防护的位置攻击则不受影响)。

若对方想射穿盾牌(见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{障碍})，则中世纪盾牌的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{硬度}为10，并提供+2@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02armor000000000]{护甲}值。

装备盾牌时，盾牌可用于盾击，伤害为力量+d4。

english:
This instigator knows how to rile up several enemies at once.

As a limited action, a character with this Edge can make a social @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03test0000000000]{Test} with @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Intimidation]{Intimidation} or @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Taunt]{Taunt} against all enemies in a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{Medium Blast Template}. The targets must be able to see and hear the hero clearly. Each defender resists and is affected by the Test separately.
chinese:
这名煽动者知晓如何一次性让数名敌人心浮气躁。

每回合一次，拥有该专长的角色能以@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Intimidation]{威吓}或@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Taunt]{嘲弄}对@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{中型爆发盖板}内的所有敌人进行一次社交@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03test0000000000]{考验}。目标必须能清楚地看到和听见该角色。各个防御方单独结算抵抗和影响。

english: Aces are pilots and drivers who have a special affinity with their vehicle. They ignore two points of penalties to any @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Boating]{Boating}, @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Driving]{Driving}, or @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-skills.Piloting]{Piloting} roll, and may spend Bennies to Soak damage for any vehicle they control or command, using the appropriate Boating, Driving, or Piloting skill instead of Vigor. Each success and raise negates a Wound.
chinese: 王牌机师是与其载具有着特殊共鸣的驾驶员。其任何驾船、驾驶和航空投骰忽略2点减值，并且可以使用助力点以对应的驾船、驾驶或航空技能(而不是活力)来给任何处于自己操作或命令下的载具化解伤害，每次成功和优良都能抵消1个损伤。

english:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{Snapfire}. A grenade launcher mounted on the bottom of an assault rifle. @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Area Effect Attacks]{Medium Blast Template}.

Rocket launchers and early torpedoes are direct-fire weapons that explode on contact with their target. @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Heavy Weapon (HW)]{Heavy Weapon}.
chinese:
@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02snapfire000000]{猝射}。搭载于突击步枪下方的榴弹发射器。 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03areaeffectat00]{中型爆发盖板}。

火箭发射器和早期鱼雷是直射火力型武器，在与目标接触后就会爆炸。@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02heavyweaponh00]{重武器}。

english:
This adventurer is very skinny, very short, or both. His @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Size and Scale]{Size} is reduced by 1, which reduces his @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Toughness} as well.

@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-rules.Size and Scale]{Size} can’t be reduced below -1, but the @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Toughness} penalty remains. A Small half-folk, for example, remains Size -1 and loses a point of Toughness.
chinese:
这名冒险者非常瘦弱或是非常矮小，又或者是兼而有之。@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{体型}-1，这也会导致@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{坚韧}的减少。

尽管@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03sizeandscale00]{体型}不能降至-1以下，但@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{坚韧}减值仍会保留。举例而言，小型半身人的体型依然是-1，但坚韧仍会-1。

english:
Amulet of the Planes

Anyone looking closely at this black circular amulet sees a dark, moving, swirl of colors. The wearer can use the amulet to cast major @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Plane Shift]{Plane Shift} once per day, but it is a difficult item to master.

The user makes a Smarts −2 roll to make the amulet take her to the plane (and the specific location on that plane) she wants. If she fails, roll a die. Odd, the amulet transports her and all those who have linked hands with her to a random location on that plane. Even, it takes her to a random @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore04theadv.JournalEntryPage.04theplanes00000]{plane} .

Price: 120,000 gp; Weight: —.

Craft: @Compendium[swpf-core-rules.swpf-powers.Plane shift]{Plane shift}; 60,000 gp.
chinese:
任何仔细观察这枚黑色圆形护符的对象都会看见一道转动的深色多彩漩涡。佩戴者每天可以使用这枚护符施放一次高级异界传送，但这个物品难以把控。

使用者进行一次-2的聪慧投骰来让该护符将自己带至想去的位面(以及此位面中的某一特定地点)。倘若失败，投一枚骰子。若为奇数，则护符将其以及所有与之牵手的对象传送至该位面的某一随机地点。若为偶数，则护符会将其带至某一随机位面(见163页)。

价格：120,000gp；重量：—。

制作：异界传送；60,000gp。

english:
Your hero’s eyes aren’t what they used to be. The character suﬀers a −1 penalty to any @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03rules000000000]{Trait roll} dependent on vision at a distance greater than 5" (10 yards), or −2 as a Major Hindrance.

If eyeglasses are available, they negate the penalty when worn. If lost or broken during a combat (generally a 50% chance when he’s @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Wounded}, falls, or suffers some other trauma), the character is @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Distracted} (and @UUID[Compendium.swpf-core-rules.swpf-rules.swpfcore03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03combat00000000]{Vulnerable} if a Major Hindrance) until the end of his next turn.
chinese:
(次要或主要)

英雄的眼睛大不如前，角色任何基于视觉且距离超过5英寸(10码)的特性投骰都会遭受-1减值，若是主要负赘则为-2。

倘若可以使用眼镜，那在佩戴时就能免受此减值。若眼镜在战斗中丢失或损坏(通常在受到损伤、坠落，或是遭受某些外伤时会有50%概率如此)，角色会陷入分神(若为主要负赘则还会陷入脆弱)，持续到其下回合结束时为止。

english:
Shields add to a character’s @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{Parry} as shown in the Parry rating. @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{Cover} subtracts from ranged attacks from the front and shielded side (attacks from the rear or unprotected side ignore cover).

Polymer shields are @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{Hardness} 10 and provide +4 @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02armor000000000]{Armor} should someone attempt to shoot through them (see @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{Obstacles}).

While worn, shields can be used to bash for Str+d4 damage.
chinese:
盾牌会让角色的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01characters0000]{格挡}获得如下加值。来自正面及持盾侧的远程攻击遭受@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{掩蔽}减值(从背后或无防护的位置攻击则不受影响)。

若对方想射穿盾牌(见@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03coverandobst00]{障碍})，则聚合物盾的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03breakingthin00]{硬度}是10，同时提供+4@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02armor000000000]{护甲}值。

装备盾牌时，盾牌可用于盾击，伤害为力量+d4。

english: Your hero’s words don’t just inspire those they’re directed at—they often inspire others as well. As a limited action, you can use Work the Room to roll an additional skill die when @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03support0000000]{Supporting} with @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{Persuasion} or @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Performance]{Performance}. The additional die Supports any other ally who can see or hear your hero, and applies to their next action, whatever it may be.
chinese: 角色的话语不仅能激励指向的对象，还能鼓舞其他听众。每回合一次，角色在以@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Persuasion]{交涉}或@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Performance]{表演}进行@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03support0000000]{援助}时，能以一个限定行动使用推波助浪来投第二 枚1枚技能骰。这枚额外的骰子可援助其他任一能看到或听见角色的盟友，并应用到对方下一个行动上(无论这会是什么行动)。

english: Uses @Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{Shooting}. @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02range000000000]{Range} 1/2/4. Shots 3 before needing to be recharged for at least two hours. Victims must make a @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{Vigor} roll at –2 or be @UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03stunned0000000]{Stunned}.
chinese: 使用@Compendium[swade-core-rules.swade-skills.Shooting]{射击}，@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor02gear00.JournalEntryPage.02range000000000]{射程}1/2/4，使用次数3，使用前需充电至少2小时。对象必须成功通过-2的@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor01charac.JournalEntryPage.01traits00000000]{活力}投骰，否则会陷入@UUID[Compendium.swade-core-rules.swade-rules.JournalEntry.swadecor03rules0.JournalEntryPage.03stunned0000000]{震慑}。
